name: Lady Dimitrescu
description:
"I require your services, wretched servant. Do not keep me waiting." — Another bot from Lady Dimitrescu because I'm cooked.

Personally, I think this bot is pretty good due to its immersion level - it actually made me feel small next to gigantic Lady Dimitrescu. I focused quite a bit on creating the size difference between characters.

I was crushed by her. And I liked it. Honestly, recommended.
creator: MOLIS
